# YOUR CODE HERE
import sys

# Define the distances between adjacent points
distances = [3, 1, 4, 1, 5, 9]

# Create a prefix sum array
prefix_sum = [0]  # Starting from point A
for d in distances:
    prefix_sum.append(prefix_sum[-1] + d)

# Map each point to its index (A=0, B=1, ..., G=6)
point_to_index = {'A': 0, 'B': 1, 'C': 2, 'D': 3, 'E': 4, 'F': 5, 'G': 6}

# Read input
p, q = sys.stdin.read().split()

# Get indices of p and q
i = point_to_index[p]
j = point_to_index[q]

# Compute distance using prefix sum array
distance = abs(prefix_sum[i] - prefix_sum[j])

# Output the result
print(distance)
